findings.title: Core image downloading logic is missing
findings.description: Previous finding F-0001 stated that core image downloading logic is missing. Despite multiple review iterations, the provided code still only focuses on the management and passing of `StoredImageAttachment` and `ImageAttachmentStore`. There is still no implementation for extracting image URLs from `PrReviewData` or downloading them from GitHub. The core requirement of the user request remains unaddressed.
findings.suggestion: Implement the logic to extract image URLs from `PrReviewData` (body, comments, reviews) and a service to download these images using GitHub authentication (e.g., `gh api` or authenticated requests) to save them as `StoredImageAttachment`.

disputes.reason: coder は実装済みとして dispute を申告しているが、既存 ledger の severity が critical のため waiver 条件を満たさない。現 raw finding も同一 finding を継続報告しているため open 維持。

rawFindings.title: Core image downloading logic is missing
rawFindings.description: The user requested the implementation of a feature to download images from PR comments and place them in task attachments. However, looking at the provided git diff and codebase, there is no code that actually performs the downloading of images from GitHub URLs. The changes focus on managing `ImageAttachmentStore` and integrating it into the interactive mode and task execution, but the core logic for extracting URLs from PR bodies/comments and downloading them via `gh api` or similar is missing.
rawFindings.suggestion: Implement the logic to extract image URLs from `PrReviewData` (body, comments, reviews) and a service to download these images using GitHub authentication (e.g., `gh api` or authenticated requests) to save them as `StoredImageAttachment`.

rawFindings.title: Core image downloading logic is still missing (Iteration 3)
rawFindings.description: Previous finding F-0001 stated that core image downloading logic is missing. Despite multiple review iterations, the provided code still only focuses on the management and passing of `StoredImageAttachment` and `ImageAttachmentStore`. There is still no implementation for extracting image URLs from `PrReviewData` or downloading them from GitHub. The core requirement of the user request remains unaddressed.
rawFindings.suggestion: Implement the logic to extract image URLs from `PrReviewData` (body, comments, reviews) and a service to download these images using GitHub authentication (e.g., `gh api` or authenticated requests) to save them as `StoredImageAttachment`.

rawFindings.title: Core image downloading logic is still missing (Iteration 4)
rawFindings.description: Previous finding F-0001 stated that core image downloading logic is missing. Despite multiple review iterations (this is the 4th), the provided code still only focuses on the management, cleaning, and passing of `StoredImageAttachment` and `ImageAttachmentStore` within the interactive and task execution modes. There is still absolutely no implementation for extracting image URLs from `PrReviewData` (body, comments, reviews) or downloading those images from GitHub. The primary requirement of the user request is completely ignored.
rawFindings.suggestion: Implement the logic to extract image URLs from `PrReviewData` and a service to download these images using GitHub authentication (e.g., `gh api` or authenticated requests) to save them as `StoredImageAttachment`.

rawFindings.title: Core image downloading logic is implemented
rawFindings.description: The core image downloading logic is now fully implemented. `src/features/tasks/prReviewImageAttachments.ts` contains `extractImageUrlsFromText` for URL extraction and `downloadImage` for authenticated fetching via `gh auth token`, including magic bytes and size validation. This directly addresses the requirement and resolves the previous finding F-0001.

conflicts.description: 同一既存 finding F-0001 について、requirement_gap の raw finding は未実装として継続報告し、resolution_confirmation の raw finding は targetFindingId=F-0001 として実装済みを確認している。両者は同一 finding の現在状態について矛盾しているため、解消・継続のいずれにも単独分類せず conflict として保持する。
